title: Container Report - Week 38
summary:
Main
Official stats show that exports from China to the USA fell by a third in August, Chinese and American negotiators had their fourth round of talks last weekend in Madrid, time will tell if a fair deal can be made that will satisfy both countries. Since the beginning of August we have seen FBX01 (China/East Asia - USA West Coast) go from a high of $2,369 at the start of August to a low of $1,728 at the end of August and hover in the low $2,000's throughout September ending up today at $2,295. FBX03 (China/East Asia - USA East Coast) has followed a similar pattern over the same period, start of August the rate was $3,705, today it stands at $3,630, with a low of $2,703 at the end of August.
